project_name: ESP32-S3 DWM3000 UWB Anchor with Relay Outputs
source_prompt: Bana bir ESP32 sensör kartı yap
assumptions: AC mains input is isolated before low-voltage logic.
DWM3000 logic and RF module domain is 1.8V.
Relay coils are 5V and must not be driven directly from MCU pins.

constraints: place away from AC isolation slot

nets.reason: DWM3000 RF output to SMA antenna connector.

rules.description: RF trace must be 50 ohm controlled impedance with 0.35mm width on specified FR4 stackup.
No vias, test points, or components are allowed on the RF trace.
Maintain 3mm RF keepout around antenna trace.
Human engineer must review AC safety, RF impedance, relay isolation, and final DRC/ERC before fabrication.

reasoning_log.message: Added RF net class and keepout constraints for DWM3000 pin 23 to SMA.

checks: Voltage mismatch mitigation added for SPI and RTLS lines
Relay isolation and low-side drivers added
AC clearance and RF impedance rules emitted
